description.en: Copy the net from one PCB object to another with two clicks. Keep the floating window open and repeat the operation effortlessly while routing.
description.zh: 通过两次点击，把一个 PCB 对象的网络复制到另一个对象。悬浮窗常驻，适合在 PCB 布线整理时反复使用。

description_full.en:
Net Painter is a KiCad 9 ActionPlugin that quickly copies the net from a target object (Track, Via, Pad, Zone, copper graphic) to a source object in two clicks.

Features:
- Two-click net copying: click source, then target.
- Persistently floating window stays open between operations.
- Supports toolbar button and plugin menu entry.
- Bilingual UI (Chinese/English) with manual language override.
- Automatically rebuilds connectivity and refills zones when needed.
description_full.zh:
Net Painter 是一个 KiCad 9 ActionPlugin，用于把对象 2 的网络快速复制到对象 1。插件启动后会打开一个常驻悬浮窗，并保持连续工作，适合在 PCB 布线整理时反复「吸网」。

功能特性：
- 两次点击完成网络复制：先点源对象，再点目标对象。
- 悬浮窗常驻，单次成功后会自动回到下一轮等待状态。
- 支持工具栏按钮和插件菜单两种入口。
- 支持中英文界面，并可手动强制指定语言。
- 源对象为 Zone 时，会在改网后自动重建连通性并重新填充。
